name: Popcorn Surprises
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the popped corn into a large, buttered bowl.
2. Heat the marshmallows, butter, and salt over low heat, stirring often, until melted and smooth.
3. Add food coloring to the mixture.
4. Pour the melted mixture over the popped corn and toss gently to coat.
5. Shape the popcorn around the lollipops into 3-inch balls.
